journals.title: Advancing LiDAR Intensity Simulation through Learning with Novel Physics-Based Modalities
journals.description: Developed a learning-based approach to generate realistic LiDAR intensity data for autonomous vehicles.
journals.authors: Vivek Anand, Bharat Lohani, Gaurav Pandey, Rakesh Mishra
journals.journal: IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems

journals.title: Towards Closing the Sim-to-Real Gap: A Physics-Guided Learning Approach for LiDAR Intensity Simulation
journals.description: Developed a physics-informed neural network simulate realistic LiDAR intensity data for autonomous vehicles.
journals.authors: Vivek Anand, Bharat Lohani, Gaurav Pandey, Rakesh Mishra
journals.journal: IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems

journals.title: Simulating Realistic LiDAR Intensity in Adverse Weather: A Physics Informed Learning Approach
journals.description: Simulating LiDAR intensity under adverse weather conditions using physics informed learning.
journals.authors: Vivek Anand, Bharat Lohani, Gaurav Pandey, Rakesh Mishra

journals.title: ReaLITy: Realistic Environment-Adaptive LiDAR Intensity Transformation across Sensors and Weather
journals.description: a unified physics-informed framework for generating sensor-specific LiDAR intensity adaptations and realistic adverse-weather transformations across datasets, sensors, and environments.
journals.authors: Vivek Anand, Bharat Lohani, Gaurav Pandey, Rakesh Mishra
journals.journal: The International Journal of Robotics Research

proceedings.authors: V Anand, B Lohani, R Mishra, G Pandey
proceedings.journal: 2025 IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV) Cluj, Romania, 2552-2557

proceedings.title: Toward Physics-Aware Deep Learning Architectures for LiDAR Intensity Simulation

proceedings.journal: Proceedings of the 14th International Conference on Simulation and Modeling Methodologies, Technologies and Applications, Dijon, France.

blogs.title: Enhancing the Realism of Simulated LiDAR Data for Autonomous Vehicles
blogs.description: An overview of methods to improve the realism of simulated LiDAR data for autonomous driving using physics-informed and learning-based approaches.
